GEOMX conclusions

MAIN ACTION POINT: **[Check in the images GCs-TB relabeled and Agg-GCs
relabeled -\> check over
image]{.underline}**![](media/image1.png){width="2.6218832020997374in"
height="2.4610312773403327in"}

1\) Heatmap (on the side)

- Make barplots on sides

- Cluster the plot

- Change figure size ratio

[[https://jokergoo.github.io/ComplexHeatmap-reference/book/heatmap-annotations.html]{.underline}](https://jokergoo.github.io/ComplexHeatmap-reference/book/heatmap-annotations.html).

- 2\) Make a supplementary table

 - Gene rationale

 - Paper citations of where they are coming from

 - Signatures in italics and gene names

- 3\) Should we GSVA

 - Check the conf formula rationale

- 5\) Heatmap with only GC/Agg with the GC genes

\##################

We can ask Deb to parallelize the segmentation - he should contact eg
Kaiyang/Ziqi

Segmentation works quite well

- Hanna and Ada will check how to open the tcycif images together
